query: intentional soft focus dreamy haze romantic blur aesthetic
message: sub-element: soft focus & dreamy haze; intentional defocus with bokeh, shallow DOF, soft light; narrative blur as aesthetic choice; anti-aesthetics

response.objective_caption: A sunlit outdoor scene featuring a green lawn and several trees with dense foliage. Patches of bright light and shadow dapple the grass, suggesting a peaceful park environment.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred depiction of a sunny park, where the distinct shapes of trees and the texture of the grassy lawn are rendered indistinct through extensive soft focus. The image presents a dreamlike wash of greens and browns with dappled sunlight, sacrificing all sharp detail for a soft, impressionistic quality.
